title: panicum dichotomiflorum subsp. puritanorum
intro: Panicum dichotomiflorum subsp. puritanorum, also known as Switchgrass, is a perennial grass native to North America, characterized by its distinctive dichotomous branching habit and feathery plumes. The medicinal properties of Switchgrass include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Switchgrass include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant, making it useful in treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Switchgrass can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional medicine practices, such as infusions, salves, and poultices.
